zh.Castle Kildrummy, Abernethy, Inverness-s: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾阿波內
zh.Whissendine, Rutland, England: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德森丁
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Abernethy於大約1215年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Lawrence de ABERNETHY42歲，母親Mary Devorguilla de Galloway31歲。他於大約1270年與Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1264年在蘇格蘭洛包爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1291年6月28日在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Abernethy于大约1215年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Lawrence de ABERNETHY42岁，母亲Mary Devorguilla de Galloway31岁。他于大约1270年与Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn在苏格兰培爾阿波內结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1264年在苏格兰洛包爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1291年6月28日在苏格兰培爾阿波內享年77岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Abernethy was born about 1215, in Fife, Scotland, his father, Lawrence de ABERNETHY, was 42 and his mother, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, was 31. He married Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn about 1270, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1264, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Roxburghshire, Scotland. He died on 28 June 1291, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Abernethy est né environ 1215, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Lawrence de ABERNETHY, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn environ 1270, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1264, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Roxburghshire, Écosse. Il est décédé le 28 juin 1291, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Abernethy um 1215 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lawrence de ABERNETHY 42 und seine Mutter Mary Devorguilla de Galloway 31. Er hat um 1270 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1264, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in Roxburghshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Juni 1291 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Abernethy è nato il circa 1215 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Lawrence de ABERNETHY, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn circa 1270, nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1264, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Roxburghshire, Scotland. Morì il 28 giugno 1291, nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Abernethyが約1215年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Lawrence de ABERNETHYは42歳，母Mary Devorguilla de Gallowayは31歳であった。約1270年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーでMaire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1264年，50歳の時，スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1291年6月28日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで77歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Abernethy(이)가 대략 1215년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence de ABERNETHY(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Devorguilla de Galloway(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1264년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1291년 6월 28일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Whissendine, Rutland, England: Whissendine, Roteland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Abernethy nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Lawrence de ABERNETHY, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn aproximadamente 1270, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1264, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Roxburghshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 28 de junho de 1291, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Abernethy родился около 1215 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lawrence de ABERNETHY было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn около 1270 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1264 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия. Он умер 28 июня 1291 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Abernethy nació aproximadamente 1215, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Lawrence de ABERNETHY, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mary Devorguilla de Galloway, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn aproximadamente 1270, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1264, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Roxburghshire, Scotland. Murió el 28 de junio de 1291, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
